detail.description: Luis Torrens singles on a line drive to right fielder Wilyer Abreu.
Luis Torrens singles on a ground ball to second baseman Michael Massey. Brett Baty to 2nd.
Luis Torrens singles on a line drive to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski. MJ Melendez to 2nd.
Luis Torrens singles on a ground ball to shortstop Ha-Seong Kim, deflected by pitcher Spencer Strider. MJ Melendez to 3rd.
Luis Torrens singles on a line drive to left fielder Heriberto Hernández. Marcus Semien to 3rd. Marcus Semien advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by left fielder Heriberto Hernández.
Luis Torrens singles on a ground ball to right fielder Owen Caissie. A.J. Ewing scores. Brett Baty scores. Marcus Semien to 3rd.
Luis Torrens singles on a ground ball to right fielder Blake Dunn. Brett Baty to 2nd.
Luis Torrens singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Dane Myers.
Luis Torrens doubles (7) on a fly ball to center fielder Dane Myers.
Luis Torrens doubles (5) on a ground ball to right fielder Cody Bellinger. Marcus Semien scores. A.J. Ewing scores.
Luis Torrens singles on a ground ball to center fielder Matt Vierling.
Luis Torrens singles on a ground ball to right fielder Wenceel Pérez. A.J. Ewing scores.
Luis Torrens singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Lawrence Butler.
Luis Torrens singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Nick Gonzales.
Luis Torrens singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Bryan Reynolds. Brett Baty scores. Marcus Semien to 3rd. Jared Young to 2nd.
Luis Torrens singles on a line drive to right fielder Gabriel Rincones Jr.
Luis Torrens doubles (11) on a ground ball to left fielder Brandon Marsh. Brett Baty scores.
Luis Torrens singles on a line drive to right fielder Brandon Marsh.
Luis Torrens singles on a ground ball to center fielder Justin Crawford.
Luis Torrens singles on a ground ball to third baseman Curtis Mead. MJ Melendez to 2nd.
Luis Torrens singles on a ground ball to right fielder James Wood, deflected by first baseman Luis García Jr.
Luis Torrens doubles (6) on a ground ball to left fielder Daylen Lile. Tyrone Taylor scores.
Luis Torrens singles on a ground ball to right fielder Luis Lara.
Luis Torrens singles on a line drive to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.
Luis Torrens singles on a line drive to right fielder Corbin Carroll.
Luis Torrens doubles (4) on a line drive to right fielder Corbin Carroll. Carson Benge scores.
Luis Torrens doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Tyrone Taylor scores. Luis Robert Jr. scores.
Luis Torrens singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Heliot Ramos.
Luis Torrens homers (1) on a fly ball to center field. Brett Baty scores.
Luis Torrens doubles (9) on a sharp fly ball to left fielder Bryce Johnson.
Luis Torrens doubles (8) on a line drive to right fielder Luke Raley.

Luis Torrens doubles (10) on a line drive to left fielder Jorge Mateo. Bo Bichette scores. Jared Young scores.
Luis Torrens singles on a ground ball to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski.
